reasoning: The sapphire gem has a genuinely charming rounded-oval silhouette — soft, friendly, not aggressive. Blue pops clearly on the dark background and holds adequately on the light cream background. The highlight rendering gives it a satisfying toy-gem personality and it passes the sticker test conceptually. However, the internal facet/cross-hatch pixel pattern introduces visual noise that muddies the read as the gem shrinks — at 1x on grey the shape is still recognizable as a gem blob but the interior charm is fully lost. The dithered outer edge on the dark panel softens the contour slightly, keeping silhouette clarity just below a clean pass. Charming shape and good color choice, but needs cleaner interior detail hierarchy (dominant highlight, simpler secondary facets) to push to pass tier.
